notes: Alpha public build. Older alpha builds must install this version so they can receive the current update flow. This installer includes the runtime app, operational README, required notices, WebView2 loader, bundled archive extractor, and a visible non-locking app update banner for newer releases. Ready includes Update, Reinstall, and Restore; selected-mod installs use the current masterlist; archive extractor work runs hidden. The installer is unsigned, so Windows SmartScreen may show a warning until code signing is added.
